title: Add an undocumented dumpbolt command
body: Add an undocumented dumpbolt command that will dump the keys and values from a bolt database, because I find myself having to dump one from time to time when troubleshooting.

comments.body: Whoops, it was supposed to be.  Should be fixed now.
